title: pkcs11 algorithm() blocks async executor thread on cold cache
description: Pkcs11Backend::algorithm() is a sync fn that opens an HSM session on OnceLock cold cache. SigningBackend::algorithm is called from async context (sign(), dispatch). The HSM open_session + login + find_objects sequence can take tens of ms on a real HSM, blocking the executor thread and violating the 'don't block in async' contract. Should be spawn_blocking or async with .await.
